title: Fresh, Gooey Slovakian Poppy Bake
description: A traditional Slovakian dessert featuring poppy seeds in a salt-bake, perfect for a Buddhist temple friendly gathering. This dish is reminiscent of childhood memories and is sure to bring a smile to anyone's face.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the eggs, one at a time, until fully incorporated.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, poppy seeds, salt, and baking powder.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, alternating with the milk, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Beat just until combined.
Pour the batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tagliere.,
Bake for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
